description_long: This is a medium-sized passenger boat with a flat-bottom hull, designed for calm waters such as rivers or urban canals. The boat features a long, rectangular body with a covered section at the rear, likely for the pilot and some passengers, and an open deck area in the middle and front. The sides are lined with white railings, providing safety for standing or seated passengers, while the roof is flat and extends over the rear section for shade. The bow area is slightly raised and painted yellow, possibly for visibility or as a loading ramp. The color scheme is primarily white and gray with orange-red trim, giving it a clean and utilitarian appearance. The boat appears to be constructed mainly from metal and wood, with some plastic or composite elements for the railings and roof.
description: A flat-bottomed, white and gray passenger boat with orange trim, featuring a covered rear section and open deck with railings. The bow is slightly raised and painted yellow, suggesting a loading area.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the boat, white railings, orange trim, and the covered rear section with an open deck.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the covered pilot/passenger area and the flat roof, with orange flooring visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the open deck, railings, and the yellow bow area.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the yellow bow area, open deck, and the entrance to the boat.
